content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 4, 1), (3, 8, 1), (6, 9, 1), (3, 6, 2), (2, 6, 4), (5, 9, 10), (0, 8, 11), (7, 9, 13), (5, 8, 16), (1, 8, 19), (1, 2, 21), (4, 6, 23), (4, 8, 25), (2, 4, 28), (4, 9, 28)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 11.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (0, 4, 1) has node 0 and time 1. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (3, 8, 1) has node 3 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 9, 1) has node 6 and time 1. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 6, 2) has node 3 and time 2. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 6, 4) has node 2 and time 4. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 9, 10) has node 5 and time 10. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 8, 11) has node 0 and time 11. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 9, 13) has node 7 and time 13. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 8, 16) has node 5 and time 16. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 8, 19) has node 1 and time 19. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 2, 21) has node 1 and time 21. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (4, 6, 23) has node 4 and time 23. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (4, 8, 25) has node 4 and time 25. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 4, 28) has node 2 and time 28. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 9, 28) has node 4 and time 28. -> Add node 9.

The nodes matched are 4, 6, 8, and 9.

Answer: [4, 6, 8, 9]
